title: SEARCH 3 — Eva counts mounds 1 to 5
prompt: Top-down high-angle shot in @backyard-kitchen onto the freshly-disturbed soil of the petunia flowerbed. Five small bumps of dark soil sit in a wobbly line. @Eva crouches in the FOREGROUND in a pink shirt, finger touching each mound one by one, counting slowly and excitedly: "ONE… TWO… THREE… FOUR… FIVE! Five bumpies!" Eva looks up beaming with both arms in the air. Soft afternoon sunlight, no other people.
